positive: A celestial botanical mandala pattern featuring interwoven elements of stylized glowing bioluminescent flora, delicate geometric spirals, and abstract stellar dust. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical, centered, and suitable for a seamless repeating textile print. Use a highly contrasting color palette of deep midnight blue, vibrant electric turquoise, and neon magenta accents against a dark background. The style should be neo-art deco meets scientific illustration, rendered with crisp, thick outlines and glowing gradients. Focus on clean silhouettes and high contrast to ensure maximum readability when printed on fabric. Intricate detail, highly detailed, vector-art quality, smooth symmetry, dark academia aesthetic.
